title: Businessmen thank troops with halibut tournament

title: PFD can be a lifesaver if you bother to wear it
summary: DARON DEAN / Daily News archive 2005 enlarge Stranded on a rock in the center of the Eagle River, three Eagle River residents await help from rescue crews Aug. 13, 2005, after they missed their pullout and their inflatable raft capsized. title: Two-pound test line lands a 38-pound king salmon
summary: KEVIN KLOTT / Anchorage Daily News more | enlarge From left to right, Lauren, Jenny and Tom Olendorff drift the Kenai River on Monday in a boat they call their "Monday boat." The Kenai is closed to motorized boats and fishing guides Mondays.
